title: pilosella × heterodoxa
intro: Pilosella × heterodoxa is a rare hybrid plant species resulting from the cross between Pilosella officinarum and Pilosella caespitosa, both members of the sunflower family. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Pilosella × heterodoxa include its ability to reduce pain and swelling, as well as its potential to treat conditions such as eczema and dermatitis. Herbal preparations of the plant can be found in the form of tinctures, infusions, and salves, which are often used topically to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
